stimulus:
Welcome to the luck game experiment!

This two-day experiment takes part in a study aimed at developing better clinical treatments.

We appreciate your participation and require your full concentration.


This is a two-day study. Payment (£6/hour) is only given upon completing both parts today and tomorrow.

You must finish the second part for compensation. After today, you'll receive an invitation for tomorrow's session.

Please ensure you can attend both sessions before proceeding. Otherwise, you may exit now.

If you have any questions, please contact us via prolific.


Please stay attentive and in fullscreen mode to ensure payment.

Thank you for participating!


Press any key to continue.
